settings.title: Performance Mod v400
settings.description: Massive performance optimization: dedup-first reconsider cascade, URI filter fast-reject, adaptive GC, optional restock/events coalescing. Hearthling-idle watchdog guards simulation safety.
settings.profile_description: Aggressiveness level. Balanced is recommended. Aggressive adds opt-in experimental patches (restock throttle, events coalescing).

profiles.safe_description: Conservative settings. Larger entity spread limit, longer cache flush intervals. Watchdog trip target when idle issues detected.
profiles.balanced_description: Moderate optimization. Good for most colonies 15-20 hearthlings.
profiles.aggressive_description: Maximum optimization including opt-in experimental patches. For large towns 25+ hearthlings.

settings.instrumentation_description: Publishes performance counters to the profiler and log every 10s. Recommended on for troubleshooting.
